title: Root Inc (ROOT) Reports Record Revenue and Substantial Loss Reduction in Q4 2023
text: Root Inc reported strong fourth-quarter 2023 performance, achieving several key milestones. The insurer reached record revenue in Q4 2023 with gross written premiums hitting $279 million. Operating losses improved dramatically by 74%, declining to $12 million from $48 million year-over-year. Policies-in-Force grew 55% to 341,764 policies. The loss ratio improved to 66% from significantly higher levels. Net combined ratio was enhanced by 68 points to 112%. Root ended 2023 with $507 million in unencumbered capital and consumed only $52 million in unencumbered cash annually, a marked improvement from $179 million in 2022. Net loss improved 59% to $24 million. The company attributes success to leveraging its technological edge for pricing and underwriting improvements. The direct distribution channel drove most growth through performance marketing and organic traffic. Company executives highlighted achieving 2023 objectives including target unit economics, expense reduction, and operational scale, positioning ROOT for continued progress in the insurance sector.
